title: Parents Want You to Buy a Flat
scenario: Your parents push you to buy a flat early 'before prices rise'. A home loan means a big EMI for 15+ years. Buy now, or keep renting and invest the difference?

choices.label: Take a home loan and buy now
choices.lesson: Buying too early can lock most of your cash flow into one illiquid asset. A home is a lifestyle + investment decision — only worthwhile if the numbers truly work.

choices.label: Keep renting, invest the difference
choices.lesson: Renting while investing the EMI gap can build comparable wealth with far more flexibility early in your career.
